selection_rule: Read this compact file first. Shortlist up to 3 templates from metadata and visual preview cues, matching product context, input language, layout variety, and motion tempo. Read only those preview docs. Read exactly one design doc after selection.

templates.title: Presentation Feature Core
templates.use_when: You want the strongest adaptive video-ad default: an input-derived micro-scene inventory, contextual modern product UI/mockups, full-bleed reveals, proof-grid moments, input-led language, layered motion with varied families, minimal player-like transport, and closed dual-aspect QA.
templates.avoid_when: You need a quieter or more print-led editorial aesthetic or a text-heavy keynote feel.

templates.title: Soft Editorial
templates.use_when: You want a warm editorial layer on top of the current base style, with calmer centered statements, soft paper contrast, and sparse copy.
templates.avoid_when: You need darker, more forceful commercial contrast or dense copy blocks.

templates.title: Emerald Editorial
templates.use_when: You want magazine-cover enterprise confidence with richer masthead rhythm, premium contrast, concise copy, and strong proof-grid or stat-wall scenes.
templates.avoid_when: You need casual, playful, or low-formality motion, or a text-heavy layout.

templates.title: Vellum
templates.use_when: You want a dark, quiet, scholarly editorial variant with very sparse, near-textless beats, full-bleed atmospherics, and slow-breathing motion.
templates.avoid_when: You need brighter pop color, louder CTA energy, or lots of on-screen copy.

templates.title: Capsule
templates.use_when: You want modular rounded cards, friendlier commercial energy, short labels, clean multi-card UI states, and structured proof-grid comparisons.
templates.avoid_when: You need austere or highly institutional formality or a paragraph-led layout.

templates.title: Cobalt Grid
templates.use_when: You want sharp design-research typography, high structure, centered analytic beats, and label-light motion.
templates.avoid_when: You need soft warmth, playful expressiveness, or a text-heavy narrative.
